scripts.generate-routes: vp exec tsr generate && vp run clean-routes
scripts.runtime: vp run -t @view-server/react#build && vp run -t @view-server/runtime#build && vp exec tsx src/runtime.ts
scripts.build: vp run -t @view-server/react#build && vp run -t @view-server/runtime#build && vp run generate-routes && vp build && vp run clean-routes
scripts.test: vp run -t @view-server/react#build && vp run -t @view-server/runtime#build && vp run generate-routes && vp test run --typecheck && vp run clean-routes
